zh.Warkworth, Northumberland, England: 英國諾圖波藍德瓦可沃斯
zh.lifeSummary: 當Lady Jean de Lyons於1215年12月20日出生在蘇格蘭阿吉爾考瓦爾時，她的父親Sir Roger de Lyons, Snr16歲，母親Maud of Warkworth12歲。她和Laumon Lamont 1st Chief of Clan Lamont至少有1個兒子。她去世在蘇格蘭，埋葬在蘇格蘭。

zh-hans.Warkworth, Northamptonshire, England: 英国諾薩普頓史爾瓦可沃斯
zh-hans.Warkworth, Northumberland, England: 英国諾圖波藍德瓦可沃斯
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Lady Jean de Lyons于1215年12月20日出生在苏格兰阿吉爾考瓦爾时，她的父亲Sir Roger de Lyons, Snr16岁，母亲Maud of Warkworth12岁。她和Laumon Lamont 1st Chief of Clan Lamont至少有1个儿子。她去世在苏格兰，埋葬在苏格兰。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Lyons
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Irish: adopted for Ó Laighin (see Lyne , Lane , Lyon ) or Ó Liatháin (see Lehane ).

variants.name: Lyon
meanings: Scottish, English, and French: from the personal name Middle English Lyon, Old French Leon (from Latin leo ‘lion’, or the cognate Greek leōn; see Leon ). Compare Lyall .
Scottish and English (of Norman origin): habitational name from Lyons-la-Forêt in Eure, Normandy. It is unlikely to be from the better-known southern French city of Lyon (see 5 below).

English and French: nickname from Middle English lioun ‘lion’ (Old English, Latin leo), Old French leon, perhaps applied to a brave, fierce, or proud person, or one with a shaggy mane of hair. Compare Lion .

nameMeanings.name: Jean
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Like Jane and Joan , a medieval variant of Old French Je(h)anne. Towards the end of the Middle Ages this form became largely confined to Scotland. In the 20th century it became more widely used in the English-speaking world and enjoyed a period of great popularity, but it is now out of fashion. Among numerous well-known and influential bearers are the British novelists Jean Plaidy ( Eleanor Hibbert , 1910–93 ) and Jean Rhys ( Ella Gwendolen Rees Williams , 1894–1979 ), British actress Jean Simmons ( 1929–2010 ), and American-born actress Jean Seberg ( 1938–79 ). It is also found as a variant spelling of the masculine name Gene .

variants.name: John
meanings: As a boy's name this represents a revival of Middle English Jan, a by‐form of John , or an adoption of the common European form with this spelling. As a girl's name it is a short form of names such as Janet and Janice .

en.lifeSummary: When Lady Jean de Lyons was born on 20 December 1215, in Cowal, Argyll, Scotland, her father, Sir Roger de Lyons, Snr, was 16 and her mother, Maud of Warkworth, was 12. She had at least 1 son with Laumon Lamont 1st Chief of Clan Lamont. She died in Scotland, and was buried in Scotland.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Lady Jean de Lyons est née le 20 décembre 1215, à Cowal, Argyll, Écosse, son père, Sir Roger de Lyons, Snr, avait 16 ans et sa mère, Maud of Warkworth, avait 12 ans. Elle a eu au moins 1 fils avec Laumon Lamont 1st Chief of Clan Lamont. Elle est décédée à Écosse, et a été enterrée à Écosse.

de.lifeSummary: Als Lady Jean de Lyons am 20. Dezember 1215 in Cowal, Argyll, Scotland geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Sir Roger de Lyons, Snr 16 und ihre Mutter Maud of Warkworth 12. Sie hatte mit Laumon Lamont 1st Chief of Clan Lamont mindestens 1 Sohn. Sie starb in Scotland und wurde in Scotland begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Lady Jean de Lyons è nata il il 20 dicembre 1215 nel Cowal, Argyll, Scotland, sua padre, Sir Roger de Lyons, Snr, aveva 16 anni e sua madre, Maud of Warkworth, aveva 12 anni. Lei avuto almeno 1 figlio con Laumon Lamont 1st Chief of Clan Lamont. Morì nel Scotland, e fu sepolta a Scotland.

ja.Cowal, Argyll, Scotland: スコットランドアルグイルコワル
ja.Warkworth, Northamptonshire, England: イギリスノーサンプトンシュアイアワークウオルス
ja.Lamont, Argyll, Scotland: スコットランドアルグイルラモント
ja.Warkworth, Northumberland, England: イギリスノースウンバーランドワークウオルス
ja.lifeSummary: Lady Jean de Lyonsが1215年12月20日にスコットランドアルグイルコワルで生まれた時，父Sir Roger de Lyons, Snrは16歳，母Maud of Warkworthは12歳であった。彼女はLaumon Lamont 1st Chief of Clan Lamontとの間に少なくとも1人の息子をもうけた。彼女はスコットランドで死去し，スコットランドにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Lady Jean de Lyons(이)가 1215년 12월 20일 스컷랜드 아그이 코월에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Sir Roger de Lyons, Snr(은)는 16세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Maud of Warkworth(은)는 12세였다. 그녀는 Laumon Lamont 1st Chief of Clan Lamont(와)과 적어도 한 명의 아들을 두었다. 그녀는 스컷랜드에서 사망했으며 스컷랜드에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Lady Jean de Lyons nasceu em 20 de dezembro de 1215, em Cowal, Argyll, Scotland, seu pai, Sir Roger de Lyons, Snr, tinha 16 anos e sua mãe, Maud of Warkworth, tinha 12 anos. Ela teve pelo menos 1 filho com Laumon Lamont 1st Chief of Clan Lamont. Ela faleceu em Scotland, e foi sepultada em Scotland.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Lady Jean de Lyons родилась 20 декабря 1215 г. в местности коуаль, аргилл, Шотландия, её отцу по имени Sir Roger de Lyons, Snr было 16 лет, а матери, которую звали Maud of Warkworth, 12. У неё был по крайней мере 1 сын от Laumon Lamont 1st Chief of Clan Lamont. Она умерла в местности Шотландия и была похоронена в местности Шотландия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Lady Jean de Lyons nació el 20 de diciembre de 1215, en Cowal, Argyll, Scotland, su papá, Sir Roger de Lyons, Snr, tenía 16 años y su mamá, Maud of Warkworth, tenía 12 años. Tuvo por lo menos 1 hijo con Laumon Lamont 1st Chief of Clan Lamont. Murió en Scotland, y fue sepultada en Scotland.
